subject: [PATCH v3 5/5] mm: add tracepoints for zone lock

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch adds tracepoint instrumentation to zone lock acquire and release operations in the Linux kernel. The implementation uses a lightweight inline helper that checks whether tracing is enabled, and calls an out-of-line helper when tracing is active. When CONFIG_TRACING is disabled, the helpers compile to empty inline stubs, leaving the fast path unaffected. This allows for easier debugging and analysis of zone lock behavior.
